hooks.command: CMD=$(node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); process.stdout.write(d.tool_input.command)"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit --amend --no-edit 2>/dev/null || true; fi
